# bratuka.dev
> Personal portfolio and project hub for BrAtUkA.

CS student, full-stack developer, and reverse engineer from Islamabad, PK. Building things that are fast, private, and actually useful.
Topics: Python, Flutter / Dart, Rust / Tauri, C# / .NET, Reverse Engineering, AI / ML, Blender / 3D.

## Tools & Web Apps
- [PDF Dark Mode Converter](https://bratuka.dev/pdf-dark-mode-converter/) - The privacy-first, browser-native PDF theming tool. Convert any PDF to dark mode safely in your browser using 16+ themes. GPU-accelerated, offline-ready, zero uploads.

## Open Source Projects (GitHub)
- [pdf-dark-mode-converter](https://github.com/BrAtUkA/pdf-dark-mode-converter) - GPU-accelerated client-side PDF dark mode converter codebase (HTML/JS).
- [knoxhybrid-monitor](https://github.com/BrAtUkA/knoxhybrid-monitor) - Lightweight system-tray app (Rust/Tauri) for real-time Knox solar inverter monitoring with outage alerts.
- [Computer-Use-Agent](https://github.com/BrAtUkA/Computer-Use-Agent) - A local VLM-powered agent (Python) that controls your computer through natural language commands.
- [Stegano](https://github.com/BrAtUkA/Stegano) - Hide text or files in images with AES-256 encryption - LSB steganography GUI (Python).
